2022 Archive

... the world is Watching.

by: Eric Tussey a.k.a. pebble

from: Boulder, CO

year: 2022

This installation highlights the diversity of the Human Species.

Mother nature's breath gives life to all of us.

Donate To This Project

Contact: eric@tussey.com

1:44 Inter-dimensional Space Time Portal

by: Harlan Emil Gruber and Maraya - TransPortals

from: Taos, NM

year: 2022

The 1:44 Inter-dimensional Space Time Portal provides an access point to the higher dimensional timelines and the ever expanding Now moment within which all of consciousness exists.

URL: https://transportals.org/144-inter-dimensional-space-time-portal/

Contact: harlanemil@gmail.com

Donate To This Project

38

by: Oz Willcox - CrazySafe Art

from: Richland, WA

year: 2022

38 is a group of letters. Each letter has a number in the alphabet.

Contact: crazysafeart@gmail.com
